block_00: Use QR codes and top up your trading account instantly
block_02: Enjoy convenient deposits with quick and secure processing, a temporary limit of 10,000 BRL, and the deposit time is less than two minutes.*
block_03: *In case you use a QR code for payment.
block_05: How top up your account via Boleto PIX?
block_06: Select Boleto PIX as a deposit method.
block_07: Specify the deposit amount and currency.
block_10: Scan the received QR code by following the prompts.
block_11: Please note, in your banking app, you can choose to pay with either a QR code or a barcode as a traditional ticket. Barcode processing time is up to 24 hours.
